mapper.sql: id, tenant_code, tenant_name, status, session_version, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, version
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tenant (tenant_code, tenant_name, status, session_version, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted, version) VALUES (#{tenantCode}, #{tenantName}, #{status}, #{sessionVersion}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{updatedBy}, #{deleted}, #{version})
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM tenant WHERE tenant_code = #{tenantCode} AND deleted = 0)
SELECT FROM tenant WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tenant SET tenant_name = #{record.tenantName}, status = #{record.status}, session_version = #{record.sessionVersion}, version = version + 1, updated_at = #{record.updatedAt}, updated_by = #{operatorId} WHERE id = #{record.id} AND version = #{record.version} AND deleted = 0
